note: Challenge 3 — schedulers operate offline/manually today. This is the shift roster the Production agent reasons over.

known_conflicts.detail: op_Keller is the only operator certified on both CELL-05 and CELL-07. If CNC-07 jobs reroute to CNC-05 during SAT-EARLY while CNC-07 is also being serviced, op_Keller is double-booked.
known_conflicts.resolution_hint: Move CNC-07 job batch to CNC-08 (op_Wagner) instead of CNC-05, OR stagger by 2h.
